name: Cherry Cheesecake Delight (Low-fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Crushed Snackwells, sugar, and Liquid Butter Buds in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 9 x 13 inch casserole dish.
3. In another bowl, beat together cream cheese, remaining sugar, Egg Beaters, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and flour until smooth.
4. Pour the filling over the crust in the prepared dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 20-30 minutes, or until set.
6. Cool completely before spreading cherry pie filling evenly over the top.
7. Top with Dream Whip and sprinkle Grape Nuts cereal on top.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
